1887900.name: 局外人 L'Etranger - Digital Art Booklet
1887900.description:
局外人 L'Etranger - Digital Art Booklet

How to get the digital art booklet:
====
Upon purchase, this book will be downloaded to your computer in pdf format.
To access your art booklet, navigate to the your L'Etranger game folder.
* Right click L'Etranger in your Steam Library
* Select Properties
* Go to the Local Files tab
* Click Browse Local Files
Enjoy!
1887900.supported_languages: 简体中文, 繁体中文
